citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
APHIS observed a female Moluccan cockatoo with a moderately overgrown upper beak. Overgrown beaks may impact a
bird's ability to eat, drink, and behave appropriately, which can be detrimental to their health and well-being. The facility
must establish and maintain programs of veterinary care that include the use of appropriate methods to prevent, control,
diagnose and treat diseases and injuries. Correct by March 13, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
APHIS observed a female Moluccan cockatoo with a moderately overgrown upper beak. Overgrown beaks may impact a 
bird's ability to eat, drink, and behave appropriately, which can be detrimental to their health and well-being. The facility 
must establish and maintain programs of veterinary care that include the use of appropriate methods to prevent, control, 
diagnose and treat diseases and injuries. Correct by March 13, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
